debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_2
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : ℕ → Ω → ENNReal
hX : ∀ (n : ℕ), Measurable (X n)
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
⊢ ∃ Y Y_lim,
    (∀ (n : ℕ), Y n ∈ (convexHull ENNReal) (Set.range fun m => X (n + m))) ∧
      Measurable Y_lim ∧ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, Tendsto (fun x => Y x ω) atTop (nhds (Y_lim ω))

failed_attempts:
refine ⟨fun n ↦ X n, fun ω ↦ ⨅ n, ⨆ m, X (n + m) ω, fun n ↦ subset_convexHull _ _ ⟨0, rfl⟩,
    measurable_iInf fun n ↦ measurable_iSup fun m ↦ hX (n + m), ?_⟩
  filter_upwards with ω
  exact tendsto_atTop_iInf_iSup fun n ↦ X n ω

use fun _ _ ↦ 0, 0
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ ?_, measurable_const, ?_⟩
  · exact zero_mem_convexHull_of_zero_smul_mem ℝ≥0∞ (subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ⟨0, rfl⟩)
  · filter_upwards with ω
    exact tendsto_const_nhds

use fun n ↦ X n, fun ω ↦ atTop.liminf (fun n ↦ X n ω)
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ subset_convexHull _ _ ⟨0, by simp⟩, measurable_liminf fun n ↦ hX n, ?_⟩
  filter_upwards with ω using tendsto_of_liminf_eq_limsup (le_limsup_of_le ⟨0, fun _ _ ↦ zero_le _⟩ 
    (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ le_refl _)) (limsup_le_of_le ⟨⊤, fun _ _ ↦ le_top⟩ 
    (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ le_refl _)) rfl rfl

exact ⟨fun _ _ ↦ 0, fun _ ↦ 0, fun n ↦ convexHull_nonempty_iff.mpr ⟨X n, 0, rfl⟩ |>.some_mem,
    measurable_const, Filter.eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ tendsto_const_nhds⟩

use fun n ↦ X n, fun ω ↦ ⨅ n, ⨆ m, X (n + m) ω
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ subset_convexHull _ _ ⟨0, by simp⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact measurable_iInf fun n ↦ measurable_iSup fun m ↦ hX (n + m)
  · filter_upwards with ω
    exact tendsto_atTop_iInf_iSup (fun n ↦ X n ω)

exact ⟨X, fun ω ↦ liminf (fun n ↦ X n ω) atTop,
    fun n ↦ subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ⟨0, rfl⟩,
    measurable_liminf hX,
    Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ tendsto_atTop_liminf (fun n ↦ X n ω)⟩
exact ⟨X, fun ω ↦ X 0 ω, fun n ↦ subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ⟨0, rfl⟩, hX 0, by simp⟩

exact ⟨X, fun ω ↦ liminf (fun n ↦ X n ω) atTop,
    fun n ↦ subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ⟨0, rfl⟩,
    measurable_liminf fun n ↦ hX n,
    ae_of_all P fun ω ↦ tendsto_of_liminf_eq_limsup (le_refl _) rfl rfl⟩

exact ⟨X, fun ω ↦ liminf (X · ω) atTop, fun n ↦ subset_convexHull _ _ ⟨0, rfl⟩,
    measurable_liminf (fun n ↦ hX n), by filter_upwards with ω using tendsto_atTop_liminf⟩

simp only [Filter.eventually_atTop, ge_iff_le]
  exact Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ tendsto_const_nhds
